description: Stepper for values <input type="number"> + data-stepper cannot reach: formatted units, currency, time, token-snap scales, discrete enums.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name for form participation

attributes.name: data-values
attributes.description: Token-snap mode: comma-separated list of values

attributes.name: data-options
attributes.description: Enum mode: JSON [{value,label}] array or csv shorthand (value==label)

attributes.name: data-format
attributes.description: Formatted mode: number | currency | percent | duration | bytes

attributes.name: data-currency
attributes.description: ISO 4217 code, used when data-format="currency" (default USD)

attributes.name: data-suffix
attributes.description: Static suffix appended to display, e.g. "px"

attributes.name: data-show-label
attributes.description: Token mode: display the token name (strips leading --)

attributes.name: data-accelerate
attributes.description: Enable long-press acceleration on the +/- buttons

attributes.name: role
attributes.description: spinbutton on the inner display element

events.name: input
events.description: Fires on every value change. Bubbles.

states.name: at-min
states.description: Value is at the lower bound

states.name: at-max
states.description: Value is at the upper bound
